name: Aallon Group Oyj
summary: Aallon Group Oyj provides accounting services to companies operating in Finland. It offers day-to-day financial management services from accounting to payroll, in digital and monthly invoicing services; tax advice, legal, employment counseling, and business advisory services; financial management services; and specialized industry solutions to the IT industry, venture capital companies, foundations, construction, and real estate companies. Aallon Group Oyj is based in Helsinki, Finland.
